test-method.name: TC001_GetUserList
test-method.description: TC001: GET /users - status 200, verify total, data size, response time

exception.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <200> but was <401>.
exception.full-stacktrace:

test-method.name: TC002_GetSingleUser

test-method.name: TC007_LoginAndBearerToken
test-method.description: TC007: POST /login, extract token, chain as Bearer in GET /users
